agents.title: Meet Your AI Copywriting Team
agents.subtitle: 8 Specialized Agents
agents.description: Each agent is a world-class expert in their field, trained with millions of high-converting copy examples. They are ready to create strategic content for your business.

positioner.name: Brand Positioning Monster (DNA)
positioner.description: Welcome agent. Creates complete strategic positioning for experts and infoproducers through guided questions.

vsl.name: VSL Monster
vsl.description: Creation of high-converting VSL (Video Sales Letter) scripts.

sales.name: Sales Page Monster
sales.description: Development of sales pages optimized for conversion.

launch.name: Launch Monster
launch.description: Planning and execution of strategic product launches.

email.name: Email Monster
email.description: Creation of high-performance email marketing sequences.

ads.name: Ads Monster
ads.description: Optimization of ads for Meta Ads, Google Ads, and other platforms.

headline.name: Headline Monster
headline.description: Generation of magnetic headlines that capture attention instantly.

short.name: Short Monster
short.description: Scripts for 1-minute videos that delight, go viral, and convert.

internalLaunch.name: Internal Launch Monster
internalLaunch.description: Complete 7-day internal launch campaign with all emails and scripts.

flashLaunch.name: Flash Launch Monster
flashLaunch.description: 3-day flash launch with maximum urgency and high conversion.

evergreenFunnel.name: Evergreen Funnel Monster
evergreenFunnel.description: Automated evergreen funnel that sells 24/7 without intervention.

webinarCampaign.name: Webinar Campaign Monster
webinarCampaign.description: Complete webinar campaign with invites, reminders, and sales pitch.

cartRecovery.name: Cart Recovery Monster
cartRecovery.description: Abandoned cart recovery sequence with high conversion rate.

leadNurture.name: Lead Nurture Monster
leadNurture.description: Cold lead nurturing sequence until they're ready to buy.

upsellCross.name: Upsell Cross Monster
upsellCross.description: Upsell and cross-sell campaigns to maximize customer value.

listRevival.name: List Revival Monster
listRevival.description: Cold list reactivation with powerful re-engagement sequence.

fullVslScript.name: Full VSL Script Monster
fullVslScript.description: Complete high-converting VSL script with professional structure.

whatsappSales.name: WhatsApp Sales Monster
whatsappSales.description: Sales sequences optimized for WhatsApp with ready-to-use templates.
